synopsis: Lando, Chewbacca, Luke, and R2-D2 fly the *Millennium Falcon* to Stenos, chasing leads on Bossk and IG-88 in hopes one will point them to Boba Fett and the frozen Han Solo. Uneasy that both trails end in the same place, Lando fears a double-cross, prompting Luke to recount an earlier misadventure on the same world. In the flashback, the heroes came to Stenos to contact a silent Rebel outpost, only to find it occupied by Rik Duel's gang of smugglers, who claimed to have joined the Rebellion and to be searching for a sacred statue of Vol prized by the native Stenaxes. After the group unearths the statue, Duel betrays them, revealing he works for Governor Quorl Matrin. Stormtroopers summoned by Chihdo attack, but a swarm of Stenaxes arrives to reclaim their idol and saves the Rebels. Matrin then ambushes the fleeing Duel gang at their ship, only for the Stenaxes to descend on the Imperials as well. Back in the present, Luke suggests they keep the ship out of sight of the city.
title: Star Wars (1977) #70: The Stenax Shuffle
